history.text:
[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A close-up selfie shows a young person outdoors with one hand on their head and the other side of their face toward the camera.

Main Subject:
A young person is centered in the frame, facing the camera at a slight angle. Their left arm is raised with the hand resting on the top of their head, and their mouth is slightly closed while looking directly toward the camera. They have short dark hair, medium-light skin, and a neutral expression with eyes partly narrowed.

Setting:
The person appears to be outside in front of a light-colored brick or cinderblock wall. Behind them, there are rectangular window openings with wooden frames. The lighting looks bright and natural, suggesting daytime. The pavement or ground area is visible near the bottom edge of the frame.

Visual Details:
The person wears a dark green short-sleeve shirt with a visible printed design near the chest; the graphic includes large outlined letters and a character illustration that is partially cut off by the framing. The camera angle is close and slightly above chest level, producing a cropped portrait view of the face and upper torso. Shadows are soft and consistent with daylight.

Visible Text:
MO" HLT (partial text is visible on the shirt; exact full text is unclear)

Practical Summary:
The image is a close-up outdoor portrait of a person looking at the camera with one hand on their head. They wear a dark green shirt with a partially visible printed graphic.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.

```json
{
  "nsfw": false,
  "confidence": 0,
  "label": "safe"
}
```
Gambar ini menampilkan foto close-up seorang anak laki-laki yang sedang memegang kepalanya. Anak laki-laki itu mengenakan kaos berwarna hijau. Latar belakang menunjukkan dinding bata dan jendela kayu. Tidak ada konten NSFW atau sugestif dalam gambar ini.
